scene: Good keel timber is scarce. A Gaulish clan controls the best upriver forests.

choices.label: Negotiate directly with the clan
choices.resultText: Oak floats downriver by the raft-load. Your yards never stall.

choices.label: Import Italian timber at cost
choices.resultText: Pricier, slower, and not one favor owed to anyone north of the wall.

scene: The council commissions a war galley. The contract is prestigious; the deadline, brutal.

choices.label: Take the contract
choices.resultText: Lamps burn in your yard past midnight. The hull grows like a living thing.

choices.label: Pass - merchant hulls pay steadier
choices.resultText: Let another yard chase glory and penalty clauses.

scene: Your dockworkers down tools over pay, with a half-finished hull on the slipway.

choices.label: Raise their pay
choices.resultText: Work resumes with songs. Margins thin, loyalty thickens.

choices.label: Hire replacement hands
choices.resultText: The hull gets finished. The old crew gets organized. This isn't over.

scene: A Gaulish boatwright shows you a hull-joint his people use on river craft. It could work at sea.

choices.label: Test it on your next hull
choices.resultText: Stronger and lighter. Within a year, two rival yards are copying you copying him.

choices.label: Greek hulls conquered the sea already
choices.resultText: The old ways hold. So does a faint itch of curiosity.

scene: After the great storm, half the harbor needs repairs at once. You can gouge or you can triage.

choices.label: Fair prices, worst damage first
choices.resultText: Captains remember who didn't bleed them when they were beached.

choices.label: Charge what desperation pays
choices.resultText: A season's profit in a month. A decade of muttering, gratis.

scene: A rival yard poaches your best shipwright with promises of a partnership.

choices.label: Counter with a real partnership
choices.resultText: He stays, now with a stake. The yard's craft deepens.

choices.label: Promote an ambitious apprentice instead
choices.resultText: Younger, hungrier, cheaper. The departed master's tricks live in the boy's hands anyway.

scene: Naval inspectors arrive unannounced. One hull batch used slightly green timber - it will hold, probably.

choices.label: Disclose it and replace the planks
choices.resultText: The inspectors note the honesty in their report. Contracts follow reports.

choices.label: Paint over it, literally
choices.resultText: Passed. Every storm those hulls sail through, you will count the days.

scene: Your finest pentekonter yet is ready to launch. The ceremony could be modest or magnificent.

choices.label: A magnificent launch with priestess and feast
choices.resultText: Wine on the bow, the whole harbor cheering. Orders arrive within days.

choices.label: Quiet launch, back to work
choices.resultText: She slides into the water at dawn, witnessed by gulls. Perfect anyway.

scene: A wreck on the shoals is yours to salvage by right of contract - but a poor fishing village got there first.

choices.label: Split the salvage with the village
choices.resultText: Half a wreck and a whole village's friendship. Their boats bring you repair work for years.

choices.label: Enforce your contract fully
choices.resultText: The law is the law. The village learns to hate it, and you.

scene: An apprentice's measuring error ruins a costly keel timber. He owns up immediately, white-faced.

choices.label: Make it a lesson, absorb the cost
choices.resultText: He never errs on a measurement again. Neither does anyone who heard the story.

choices.label: Dock his wages for a year
choices.resultText: The debt is fair on papyrus. The boy's hands shake near keels now, which is its own cost.
